docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GIOVANNI GRAY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MELANIE BETTIS, TTX BDR SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAY, GIOVANNI $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $117.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,217.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, GIOVANNI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, GIOVANNI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-23-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $117.50 AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, GIOVANNI
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
